Episodes.Title: Killer Attitude
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Corey Shurge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jesse Bond, Jesse LaVercombe
Episodes.Plot: Investigators are surprised to hear what went on in a frosty cockpit between a green first officer and a cocky captain, when Northwest Airlink 5719 flew into Minnesota on a cold winter's night.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Myth
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, David Ingram, Benjamin Sutherland
Episodes.Plot: When Comair Flight 3272 spirals into the ground investigators from the NTSB are forced to confront a longstanding belief amongst pilots that may have lead to this fatal crash.

Episodes.Title: Turning Point
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Benjamin Tucker
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Albert Chung, Kevin Chiao
Episodes.Plot: Air China Flight 129 was approaching Busan airport on the South Korean Coast. What happened in those last few minutes that caused a Boeing 767 to crash into a mountainside killing all but the pilot and 37 passengers?

Episodes.Title: Explosive Proof
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Corey Shurge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jeffrey Knight, Bruce Pringle
Episodes.Plot: Just minutes after taking off from NYC JFK Airport, TWA Flight 800 is ripped apart by a massive explosion. With a possible terror attack on their hands, the FBI joins investigators from the NTSB

Episodes.Title: Lethal Turn
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Michael Park Ingram, Von Flores
Episodes.Plot: Amid thick smoke from a forest fire, Garuda Indonesia Flight 152 approached the airport on the island of Sumatra. But just minutes from the runway the Airbus A300 crashed, claiming the lives of all 234 people on board.

Episodes.Title: Storming Out
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Park, Martin Sims
Episodes.Plot: When USAir Flight 1016 fell out of the sky above North Carolina during a storm most passengers on board perished. The weather was to blame. But for investigators that was only part of the story.

Episodes.Title: Terror Over Egypt
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Doug Crosbie
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Stephen McGrath
Episodes.Plot: On 31 October 2015, Metrojet Flight 9268 disintegrates in mid-air and crashes into the Sinai Peninsula during a routine chartered flight from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport to Pulkovo Airport, killing all 224 people on board.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Discussions
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Jeff Sturge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Vincent Marciano
Episodes.Plot: LAPA Flight 3142 encounters a serious problem while taking off from Buenos Aires, Argentina. The resulting investigation reveals a shocking cause.

Episodes.Title: The Lost Plane
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Corey Shurge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Redd Ochoa, Nicco Lorenzo Garcia
Episodes.Plot: Thai Airways International Flight 311 is on final approach to Tribhuvan International Airport in Kathmandu, Nepal, in poor weather conditions when things go horribly wrong.
